title: ranunculus spicatus subsp. spicatus
intro: Ranunculus spicatus subsp. spicatus, also known as the Lesser Spearwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The Lesser Spearwort has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. The plant's medicinal properties can be found in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
